[index.html](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/29288599/index.html)
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8" />
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0" />
  <title>ICRAMIE 2027 | NIT Warangal</title>
  <meta name="description" content="International Conference on Recent Advances in Manufacturing & Industrial Engineering (ICRAMIE 2027), 29–30 March 2027, NIT Warangal." />
  <style>
    :root {
      --navy:#102b5c;
      --blue:#1f5eff;
      --cyan:#39d4ff;
      --purple:#9e62ff;
      --pink:#ff6fcf;
      --orange:#ff9d42;
      --gold:#ffd85b;
      --soft:#f5f8ff;
      --paper:#ffffff;
      --ink:#17304d;
      --muted:#63738a;
      --line:#d9e4f4;
      --shadow:0 20px 48px rgba(22,47,92,.12);
      --radius:26px;
    }
    *{box-sizing:border-box}
    html{scroll-behavior:smooth}
    body{margin:0;font-family:Inter,Segoe UI,Roboto,Arial,sans-serif;background:linear-gradient(180deg,#f8fbff 0%, #eef5ff 100%);color:var(--ink);line-height:1.65}
    img{max-width:100%;display:block}
    a{color:inherit}
    .wrap{max-width:1200px;margin:auto;padding:0 22px}

    .topbar{background:linear-gradient(90deg,var(--navy),#173b77,var(--purple));color:#fff;font-size:14px}
    .topbar .wrap{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;gap:12px;padding:10px 22px;flex-wrap:wrap}
    .pill{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;padding:6px 12px;border-radius:999px;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.25);text-decoration:none;background:rgba(255,255,255,.08)}

    .nav{position:sticky;top:0;z-index:50;background:rgba(255,255,255,.94);backdrop-filter:blur(14px);border-bottom:1px solid rgba(217,228,244,.8)}
    .nav .wrap{display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;justify-content:center;padding:16px 22px 14px}
    .brand{display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;gap:10px;text-decoration:none;text-align:center;margin-bottom:12px}
    .brand-logo{width:82px;height:82px;object-fit:contain;padding:7px;border-radius:22px;background:linear-gradient(180deg,#fff,#edf5ff);box-shadow:0 10px 26px rgba(22,53,106,.16);border:1px solid #dce8f7}
    .brand-title{font-weight:950;font-size:22px;letter-spacing:.3px;color:var(--navy)}
    .brand-title small{display:block;font-size:13px;font-weight:700;color:var(--muted);margin-top:3px}
    .links{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:18px;font-size:14px;font-weight:800;color:#2c405d}
    .links a{text-decoration:none;padding:6px 2px;position:relative}
    .links a:after{content:"";position:absolute;left:0;bottom:0;width:100%;height:2px;background:linear-gradient(90deg,var(--cyan),var(--pink));transform:scaleX(0);transform-origin:left;transition:.25s}
    .links a:hover:after{transform:scaleX(1)}
    .menu-btn{display:none;border:0;background:var(--blue);color:#fff;border-radius:12px;padding:10px 14px;font-weight:800}

    .hero{position:relative;overflow:hidden;background:
      radial-gradient(circle at 8% 16%, rgba(57,212,255,.30), transparent 20%),
      radial-gradient(circle at 90% 14%, rgba(255,111,207,.22), transparent 24%),
      radial-gradient(circle at 80% 76%, rgba(255,157,66,.24), transparent 20%),
      linear-gradient(135deg, #112e61 0%, #1d56ce 38%, #7a53ff 70%, #ff6fcf 100%);
      color:#fff;}
    .hero:before{content:"";position:absolute;inset:0;background-image:radial-gradient(rgba(255,255,255,.18) 1.6px, transparent 1.6px);background-size:28px 28px;opacity:.22}
    .hero .wrap{position:relative;z-index:1;display:grid;grid-template-columns:1.15fr .85fr;gap:34px;align-items:center;padding:82px 22px 76px}
    .hero-center-logo{display:flex;justify-content:flex-start;margin-bottom:18px}
    .hero-logo-badge{width:118px;padding:10px;border-radius:30px;background:linear-gradient(180deg,#fff,#ecf4ff);box-shadow:0 14px 30px rgba(14,40,86,.24);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.7)}
    .eyebrow{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;padding:8px 15px;border-radius:999px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.12);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.25);font-weight:900;font-size:14px}
    .title{margin:18px 0 18px;line-height:1.02;letter-spacing:-1.5px}
    .title-intro{display:block;font-size:clamp(28px,3.7vw,42px);font-weight:900;color:#edf7ff}
    .title-main{display:block;font-size:clamp(42px,6vw,76px);font-weight:1000;background:linear-gradient(90deg,#8beeff 0%, #dffaff 28%, #ffe27c 58%, #ffd0f2 82%, #fff 100%);-webkit-background-clip:text;background-clip:text;color:transparent}
    .title-tag{display:block;font-size:clamp(30px,4.2vw,52px);font-weight:1000;color:#fff173;text-shadow:0 4px 20px rgba(0,0,0,.14);margin-top:8px}
    .hero p{max-width:760px;font-size:18px;color:rgba(255,255,255,.93);margin:0 0 28px}
    .cta{display:flex;gap:12px;flex-wrap:wrap}
    .btn{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;padding:13px 20px;border-radius:999px;font-weight:900;text-decoration:none;border:2px solid transparent;transition:.2s ease}
    .btn:hover{transform:translateY(-2px)}
    .btn.primary{background:#fff;color:var(--navy)}
    .btn.secondary{background:rgba(255,255,255,.08);border-color:rgba(255,255,255,.32);color:#fff}
    .btn.gold{background:linear-gradient(90deg,#ffd85b,#ffb84d);color:#15233d}

    .hero-card{background:rgba(255,255,255,.11);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.24);backdrop-filter:blur(10px);border-radius:28px;padding:26px;box-shadow:0 22px 44px rgba(12,28,69,.22)}
    .hero-card-header{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:14px;margin-bottom:14px}
    .hero-card-header img{width:72px;height:72px;object-fit:contain;padding:5px;border-radius:20px;background:#fff}
    .hero-card h2{margin:0;text-align:center;font-size:30px}
    .hero-card .sub{text-align:center;color:#d8efff;font-weight:700;margin:6px 0 18px}
    .data-row{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;gap:16px;padding:13px 0;border-top:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.23)}
    .data-row b{color:#cbfbff}

    section{padding:72px 0}
    .section-title{margin:0 0 12px;font-size:clamp(29px,3.5vw,44px);line-height:1.15;color:var(--navy)}
    .lead{max-width:920px;margin:0 0 28px;color:var(--muted);font-size:17px}
    .grid{display:grid;gap:22px}
    .two{grid-template-columns:repeat(2,minmax(0,1fr))}
    .three{grid-template-columns:repeat(3,minmax(0,1fr))}
    .card{background:linear-gradient(180deg,#ffffff,#fbfdff);border:1px solid var(--line);border-radius:var(--radius);box-shadow:var(--shadow);padding:24px;position:relative;overflow:hidden}
    .card:before{content:"";position:absolute;left:-40px;top:-40px;width:120px;height:120px;border-radius:999px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(57,212,255,.12),rgba(158,98,255,.06));}
    .card > *{position:relative;z-index:1}
    .card h3{margin:0 0 10px;color:var(--blue)}
    .card p{margin:0;color:var(--muted)}
    .theme-list{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(2,minmax(0,1fr));gap:14px;margin-top:18px}
    .theme{background:linear-gradient(90deg,rgba(57,212,255,.14),rgba(158,98,255,.14));border:1px solid #d7e4f3;border-radius:18px;padding:14px 16px;font-weight:850;color:#203654;box-shadow:0 8px 16px rgba(24,52,99,.05)}
    .date-table,.fee-table{width:100%;border-collapse:collapse;background:#fff;border-radius:20px;overflow:hidden;box-shadow:var(--shadow)}
    th,td{padding:14px 15px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--line);text-align:left;vertical-align:top}
    th{background:linear-gradient(90deg,var(--blue),var(--purple));color:#fff}
    tr:last-child td{border-bottom:0}
    .date-table td:last-child,.fee-table td:nth-child(n+3){font-weight:900;color:var(--navy);white-space:nowrap}
    .note{margin-top:12px;color:var(--muted);font-size:14px}
    .badge{display:inline-block;background:#e7fbff;color:#0b6070;border:1px solid #c9f3fa;border-radius:999px;padding:5px 10px;font-weight:900;font-size:13px}
    .people{columns:2;column-gap:34px}
    .people p{break-inside:avoid;margin:0 0 8px;color:#253244}
    .role-card{border-left:5px solid var(--pink)}

    .tribute{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#ffffff, #f8fbff);border:1px solid var(--line);border-radius:30px;padding:30px;box-shadow:var(--shadow)}
    .tribute-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:360px 1fr;gap:30px;align-items:start}
    .tribute-photo-wrap{background:linear-gradient(180deg,#eef8ff,#ffffff);border:1px solid #dfe9f6;border-radius:26px;padding:18px;box-shadow:0 10px 24px rgba(17,45,82,.08)}
    .tribute-photo{width:100%;aspect-ratio:1/1;object-fit:cover;border-radius:22px;border:6px solid #fff;box-shadow:0 14px 28px rgba(18,49,92,.14)}
    .photo-note{margin-top:14px;font-size:13px;color:var(--muted)}
    .tribute-mark{display:inline-block;padding:7px 13px;border-radius:999px;background:linear-gradient(90deg,rgba(57,212,255,.14),rgba(255,111,207,.16));color:var(--blue);font-weight:900;font-size:13px;letter-spacing:.4px;text-transform:uppercase}
    .tribute-name{margin:14px 0 8px;font-size:clamp(28px,3.8vw,44px);line-height:1.1;color:var(--navy)}
    .tribute-designation{margin:0 0 16px;font-size:18px;font-weight:700;color:#355273}
    .quote-panel{padding:24px;border-radius:24px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(57,212,255,.08),rgba(255,111,207,.07),#fff);border:1px solid #e2eaf6}
    .quote-panel p{margin:0 0 14px;color:#31465e}
    .quote-panel p:last-child{margin-bottom:0}

    .contact-box{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#132f62 0%, #1d5cf4 45%, #985fff 100%);color:#fff;border-radius:28px;padding:32px;display:grid;grid-template-columns:1.2fr .8fr;gap:22px;align-items:center;box-shadow:0 22px 48px rgba(14,34,77,.2)}
    .contact-box p{color:rgba(255,255,255,.90);margin:0 0 14px}
    footer{background:#0d1e36;color:#c9d7eb;padding:36px 0}
    footer .wrap{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;gap:18px;flex-wrap:wrap}
    footer b{color:#fff}

    @media (max-width:960px){
      .hero .wrap,.two,.three,.contact-box,.tribute-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr}
      .people{columns:1}
      .theme-list{grid-template-columns:1fr}
      .links{display:none;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;padding-top:14px}
      .links.open{display:flex}
      .menu-btn{display:block;margin-top:6px}
      .nav .wrap{padding-bottom:16px}
      .hero .wrap{padding-top:64px;padding-bottom:60px}
      .hero-center-logo{justify-content:center}
      .title,.hero p{text-align:center}
      .cta{justify-content:center}
      .eyebrow{display:flex;margin:0 auto;width:max-content}
    }
  </style>
</head>
<body>
  <div class="topbar">
    <div class="wrap">
      <span>International Conference • 29–30 March 2027</span>
      <a class="pill" href="mailto:icram2027@gmail.com">✉ icram2027@gmail.com</a>
    </div>
  </div>

  <nav class="nav">
    <div class="wrap">
      <a class="brand" href="#home">
        <img class="brand-logo" src="data:image/png;base64," alt="NIT Warangal logo" />
        <span class="brand-title">ICRAMIE 2027<small>NIT Warangal • Mechanical Engineering</small></span>
      </a>
      <button class="menu-btn" onclick="document.querySelector('.links').classList.toggle('open')">Menu</button>
      <div class="links">
        <a href="#about">About</a>
        <a href="#themes">Themes</a>
        <a href="#dates">Dates</a>
        <a href="#fees">Fees</a>
        <a href="#tribute">Prof. Lanka Tribute</a>
        <a href="#committee">Committee</a>
        <a href="#contact">Contact</a>
      </div>
    </div>
  </nav>

  <header class="hero" id="home">
    <div class="wrap">
      <div>
        <div class="hero-center-logo"><div class="hero-logo-badge"><img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="NIT Warangal official logo" /></div></div>
        <span class="eyebrow">NIT Warangal • Telangana, India</span>
        <h1 class="title">
          <span class="title-intro">International Conference on Recent Advances in</span>
          <span class="title-main">Manufacturing &amp; Industrial Engineering</span>
          <span class="title-tag">(ICRAMIE–2027)</span>
        </h1>
        <p>ICRAMIE 2027 brings together researchers, academicians, industry professionals, policymakers, and technical officers to exchange advances in manufacturing innovation, industrial engineering, Industry 4.0/5.0, AI &amp; ML-enabled production, and sustainable engineering systems.</p>
        <div class="cta">
          <a class="btn primary" href="ICRAMIE2027_Brochure.pdf" target="_blank" download>Download Brochure</a>
          <a class="btn secondary" href="https://www.icramie2027.com" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Visit Website</a>
          <a class="btn gold" href="mailto:icram2027@gmail.com?subject=ICRAMIE%202027%20Query">Contact Organizers</a>
        </div>
      </div>

      <aside class="hero-card">
        <div class="hero-card-header"><img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="NIT Warangal emblem" /></div>
        <h2>ICRAMIE-2027</h2>
        <div class="sub">Hosted by the Department of Mechanical Engineering, NIT Warangal</div>
        <div class="data-row"><span>Conference Dates</span><b>29–30 Mar 2027</b></div>
        <div class="data-row"><span>Venue</span><b>Seminar Hall Complex, NITW</b></div>
        <div class="data-row"><span>Department</span><b>Mechanical Engineering</b></div>
        <div class="data-row"><span>Abstract Deadline</span><b>30 Sep 2026</b></div>
      </aside>
    </div>
  </header>

  <section id="about">
    <div class="wrap">
      <h2 class="section-title">About the Conference</h2>
      <p class="lead">The International Conference on Recent Advances in Manufacturing Innovation and Engineering aims to provide a premier platform for researchers, academicians, industry professionals, and policymakers to exchange knowledge and showcase cutting-edge developments in advanced manufacturing and industrial engineering.</p>
      <div class="grid two">
        <div class="card">
          <h3>Conference Focus</h3>
          <p>The conference covers additive manufacturing and welding, advanced materials, material design and characterization, smart manufacturing, Industry 4.0/5.0, AI &amp; machine learning for intelligent data-driven production systems, industrial engineering, operations research, supply chain management, quality engineering, product design, advanced machining and forming, and computational modelling and simulation.</p>
        </div>
        <div class="card">
          <h3>Who Should Attend?</h3>
          <p>Experts, scholars, researchers, faculty members, students, industry professionals, scientific officers, and technical officers working in advanced manufacturing, industrial engineering, Industry 4.0/5.0, AI &amp; ML and related applications are warmly invited.</p>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </section>

  <section id="themes" style="padding-top:0">
    <div class="wrap">
      <h2 class="section-title">Conference Themes</h2>
      <p class="lead">ICRAMIE 2027 encourages interdisciplinary participation across core and emerging manufacturing and industrial engineering domains.</p>
      <div class="theme-list">
        <div class="theme">Additive Manufacturing &amp; Welding</div>
        <div class="theme">Advanced Materials, Design &amp; Characterization</div>
        <div class="theme">Smart Manufacturing &amp; Industry 4.0/5.0</div>
        <div class="theme">AI &amp; Machine Learning in Production</div>
        <div class="theme">Industrial Engineering &amp; Operations Research</div>
        <div class="theme">Supply Chain &amp; Quality Engineering</div>
        <div class="theme">Advanced Machining &amp; Forming</div>
        <div class="theme">Computational Modelling &amp; Simulation</div>
        <div class="theme">Robotics, Automation &amp; Mechatronics</div>
        <div class="theme">Aerospace, Automotive, Defence &amp; Biomedical Manufacturing</div>
        <div class="theme">Sustainable &amp; Green Manufacturing</div>
        <div class="theme">Product &amp; Industrial Design</div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </section>

  <section id="venue" style="padding-top:0">
    <div class="wrap">
      <h2 class="section-title">Venue &amp; Travel</h2>
      <div class="grid two">
        <div class="card">
          <h3>Venue</h3>
          <p>Seminar Hall Complex, National Institute of Technology Warangal, Hanamkonda, Telangana – 506004, India.</p>
          <div class="grid" style="margin-top:18px">
            <div class="card"><h3>By Air</h3><p>Nearest airport: Rajiv Gandhi International Airport, Hyderabad, approximately 168 km from NIT Warangal.</p></div>
            <div class="card"><h3>By Train</h3><p>Kazipet Railway Station is about 3.6 km and Warangal Railway Station is about 10.3 km from NIT Warangal.</p></div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="card">
          <h3>About NIT Warangal</h3>
          <p>National Institute of Technology Warangal, formerly Regional Engineering College, was established in 1959. It is a premier technical institute with 13 departments, undergraduate, postgraduate and doctoral programmes, a fully residential 250-acre campus, and strong infrastructure including laboratories, library, seminar halls and guest houses.</p>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </section>

  <section id="dates" style="padding-top:0">
    <div class="wrap">
      <h2 class="section-title">Important Dates</h2>
      <table class="date-table">
        <tbody>
          <tr><td>Abstract submission deadline</td><td>30/09/2026</td></tr>
          <tr><td>Notification of acceptance of abstract</td><td>20/10/2026</td></tr>
          <tr><td>Full paper submission</td><td>20/11/2026</td></tr>
          <tr><td>Registration — Early bird</td><td>20/12/2026</td></tr>
          <tr><td>Notification of acceptance of full paper</td><td>30/12/2026</td></tr>
          <tr><td>Registration — Regular</td><td>20/01/2027</td></tr>
        </tbody>
      </table>
    </div>
  </section>

  <section id="fees">
    <div class="wrap">
      <h2 class="section-title">Registration Fee</h2>
      <p class="lead">Registration fee is subject to 18% GST additional.</p>
      <div style="overflow-x:auto">
        <table class="fee-table">
          <thead>
            <tr><th>Delegate Type</th><th>Category</th><th>Early Bird</th><th>Regular</th></tr>
          </thead>
          <tbody>
            <tr><td rowspan="3"><b>Indian Delegates (INR)</b></td><td>Students (BTech/MTech)</td><td>Rs. 4,000</td><td>Rs. 6,000</td></tr>
            <tr><td>Academic delegates: Faculty, Ph.D. scholars, post-doctoral fellows, public sector R&amp;Ds</td><td>Rs. 5,000</td><td>Rs. 7,000</td></tr>
            <tr><td>Non-academic / Industry delegates</td><td>Rs. 10,000</td><td>Rs. 12,000</td></tr>
            <tr><td rowspan="3"><b>Overseas Delegates (USD)</b></td><td>Research scholars / students</td><td>$180</td><td>$230</td></tr>
            <tr><td>Academic delegates: Faculty, post-doctoral fellows, public sector R&amp;Ds</td><td>$350</td><td>$400</td></tr>
            <tr><td>Non-academic / Industry delegates</td><td>$450</td><td>$500</td></tr>
          </tbody>
        </table>
      </div>
      <p class="note"><span class="badge">Included</span> Technical sessions and cultural evening, conference proceedings in soft form, conference kit, three lunches, tea/coffee, and conference banquet dinner.</p>
    </div>
  </section>

  <section id="leadership" style="padding-top:0">
    <div class="wrap">
      <h2 class="section-title">Conference Leadership</h2>
      <div class="grid three">
        <div class="card role-card"><h3>Patron</h3><p><b>Professor Bidyadhar Subudhi</b><br>Director, NIT Warangal</p></div>
        <div class="card role-card"><h3>Chairman</h3><p><b>Prof. Y. Ravi Kumar</b></p></div>
        <div class="card role-card"><h3>Convenor</h3><p><b>Prof. A. Venu Gopal</b></p></div>
        <div class="card role-card"><h3>Co-Convenor</h3><p><b>Prof. P. Vamsi Krishna</b></p></div>
        <div class="card role-card"><h3>Organizing Secretaries</h3><p>Prof. G. Venkatesh<br>Prof. M. Manjaiah<br>Prof. M. Bhargava</p></div>
        <div class="card role-card"><h3>Treasurer</h3><p><b>Prof. Vijay Choyal</b></p></div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </section>

  <section id="tribute" style="padding-top:0">
    <div class="wrap">
      <h2 class="section-title">Honouring Prof. Krishnanand Lanka</h2>
      <div class="tribute">
        <div class="tribute-grid">
          <div class="tribute-photo-wrap">
            <img class="tribute-photo" src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Prof. Krishnanand Lanka" />
            <div class="photo-note">Updated with the provided photo of Prof. Krishnanand Lanka.</div>
          </div>
          <div>
            <span class="tribute-mark">Lifetime Contribution Tribute</span>
            <h3 class="tribute-name">Prof. Krishnanand Lanka</h3>
            <p class="tribute-designation">Professor (HAG), Department of Mechanical Engineering<br>National Institute of Technology, Warangal</p>
            <div class="quote-panel">
              <p>The organizing committee of the conference proudly honors Prof. Krishnanand Lanka on the momentous occasion of his upcoming superannuation on <b>31st March 2027</b>.</p>
              <p>With nearly <b>41 years of exemplary service</b> at NIT Warangal, Prof. Lanka has been a pillar of academic excellence, institutional leadership, and groundbreaking research in Industrial Engineering, CAD/CAM, and Additive Manufacturing. Beyond his administrative roles—including heading the School of Management and the Siemens Centre of Excellence—his true legacy lies in the thousands of engineering careers and research minds he has shaped.</p>
              <p>We invite colleagues, alumni, and attendees to join us at the conference in expressing our deepest gratitude to Prof. Lanka for his lifetime of dedication to the engineering community and wishing him a fulfilling next chapter.</p>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </section>

  <section id="committee" style="padding-top:0">
    <div class="wrap">
      <h2 class="section-title">Committee Members</h2>
      <div class="grid two">
        <div class="card">
          <h3>Organising Committee</h3>
          <div class="people">
            <p>Dr. L. Krishnanand, NIT Warangal</p><p>Dr. CSP Rao, NIT Warangal</p><p>Dr. S. Srinivasa Rao, NIT Warangal</p><p>Dr. P. Bangaru Babu, NIT Warangal</p><p>Dr. N. Selvaraj, NIT Warangal</p><p>Dr. P. Ravi Kumar, NIT Warangal</p><p>Dr. G. Amba Prasada Rao, NIT Warangal</p><p>Dr. K.V. Sai Srinadh, NIT Warangal</p><p>Dr. Adepu Kumar, NIT Warangal</p><p>Dr. R. Narasimha Rao, NIT Warangal</p><p>Dr. V. Suresh Babu, NIT Warangal</p><p>Dr. A. Veeresh Babu, NIT Warangal</p><p>Dr. M. Joseph Davidson, NIT Warangal</p><p>Dr. V. Vasu, NIT Warangal</p><p>Dr. G.         </div>
        <div class="card">
          <h3>Technical Advisory Committee</h3>
          <div class="people">
            <p>Dr. CVS Kiran, Redbaloon Aerospace, India</p><p>Dr. Anil Kumar Vesangi, VSSC, ISRO, India</p><p>Dr. Amit Arora, IIT Gandhinagar, India</p><p>Dr. Vamsi Krishna Balla, CSIR, India</p><p>Dr. Ajit Kumar Mohanty, Director, BARC, India</p><p>Dr. Vardhan Lal, DMRL, Hyderabad, India</p><p>Dr. M.           </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </section>

  <section id="contact" style="padding-top:0">
    <div class="wrap">
      <div class="contact-box">
        <div>
          <h2 class="section-title" style="color:#fff;margin-bottom:8px">Download Brochure &amp; Contact</h2>
          <p>Use the brochure for detailed conference information, fees, dates, venue, and committee details. A registration confirmation letter will be sent by e-mail on receipt of the payment.</p>
          <p><b>Cancellation policy:</b> Written cancellation requests sent on or before 25 Feb 2027 are eligible for 50% refund of registration fee after bank charges and administrative fee. No refund after 25 Feb 2027.</p>
        </div>
        <div class="cta">
          <a class="btn primary" href="ICRAMIE2027_Brochure.pdf" target="_blank" download>Download Brochure PDF</a>
          <a class="btn gold" href="mailto:icram2027@gmail.com">Email Organizers</a>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </section>

  <footer>
    <div class="wrap">
      <div><b>ICRAMIE 2027</b><br>International Conference on Recent Advances in Manufacturing &amp; Industrial Engineering</div>
      <div>Mechanical Engineering, NIT Warangal<br>29–30 March 2027</div>
    </div>
  </footer>
</body>
</html>
